<!-- What does this change, and why? Link any related issue. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Facts are **sourced or labeled** (cite a link, or mark it unverified — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] Scripts pass `shellcheck --severity=warning` and are idempotent (`--dry-run` where they mutate a device)
- [ ] Markdown passes `markdownlint-cli2`
- [ ] **No firmware binaries committed** — links + SHA256 only
- [ ] Tested / verified how:

<!-- e.g. "shellcheck clean; ran --dry-run on a live H68K; booted the built SD" -->
